text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the last day of summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since her heat stroke, Narita Brian has been
on an adjusted training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Back to normal.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about me. You should focus on
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
When we get back to the academy, I want to train
for the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list: Is there anything else you'd like to do?
Is there anything else you'd like to do?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...No. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
We don't have much time until the Kikuka Sho.
We have to focus on what really needs doing.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. I'll have a talk with the director and URA
folks as soon as I get back.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm very sorry to make you do this...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Don't mention it. I've already run the race I came
here to run. I've got more time to spare than
anyone.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Looks like it'll have to wait even longer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Silent, she clenches her fist tightly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If only she could have run against Symboli Rudolf
when she had the chance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If only she'd stayed in good enough condition to
run against Symboli Rudolf...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Is there anyone left?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you... I figured Brian would have already
boarded the bus.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Did something happen?
choice_data_list:
When she fully recovers, I'd like you to run with
her.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...The results of competition strongly affect us for
better and for worse.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, we must choose both the time and the
opponent carefully—for both our sakes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Were it still summer, it would've been motivating
for her. But fall is an important season for the two
of you, is it not?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: If she were to lose at a time like this...
choice_data_list: ...I'm fully aware of what I'm asking.
...I'm fully aware of what I'm asking.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...I'll give it some thought.
